name: Crow Tengu
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>破</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>は</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のカラス<ruby lang="jp"><rb>天</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>狗</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぐ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If this card in your possession is destroyed by an opponent's card effect and sent to your GY, or if this card is Special Summoned from the GY: You can target 1 Attack Position monster your opponent controls; destroy it. You can only use this effect of "Crow Tengu" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card in your possession is destroyed by an opponent's card effect and sent to your GY, or if this card is Special Summoned from the GY: You can target 1 Attack Position monster your opponent controls; destroy it. You can only use this effect of "Crow Tengu" once per turn.
eff: If this card in your possession is destroyed by an opponent's card effect and sent to your GY, or if this card is Special Summoned from the GY: You can target 1 Attack Position monster your opponent controls; destroy it. You can only use this effect of "Crow Tengu" once per turn.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
mst: Destroys your opponent's face-up Attack Position Monster Cards
